title: Primordial Weaponry
description: Adds various weapons from familiar franchises, in 3D form.
body:
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
![Primordial Weaponry: A New Path](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eb02a9139df66ea0a5eacd73e674002086bb1fa4.png)
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
![Description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1c015da4c8cb19bb535b80af4d9ab7c3da9511df.png)
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
### This mod adds various weaponry from all kinds of media, ranging from video games to TV shows, movies, and folklore! _The weapons do not (at this moment) possess any custom abilities, effects, or anything of the sort._
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Now compatible with

![Better Combat Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a8894f6ed73eaa8e6354def3690f77af6faa4ec0.png)                

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
![Information](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/873c9a078eda16221991974574bb0dbede9a0670.png)
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

You might've already heard of this mod or stumbled upon it. And you would be right! There's a reason I've added "A New Path" to the mod title. 
I wasn't content with the previous work I've done on the mod and decided to delete it and start from scratch. I'm working on remodeling all the weapons I've promised to add from the last project, and some other things.
A problem I had while working on the last project was giving myself deadlines and trying to release frequent updates. But I'm done with that now. I will release updates when I can and when I'm ready.
Another issue was adding too much content, like different resources, biomes, dimensions, etc. While this sounds fun on the surface, it was ultimately too much for me. So I'll be keeping this mod as simple and as vanilla-friendly as possible this time!


There are currently no plans to port the mod to older versions. If a specific version is requested enough it will be added after the 2.x.x. version release. If a lot of minecraft versions are requested a poll will be made to decide in which order the mod will be ported to. (e.g. if 1.20 wins 1st and 1.19 2nd and 1.18 3rd the mod will be ported to the one that is 1st and then to the one that won 2nd and so on)

Take note that the weapon models are not final, they will in some way or another be changed.

### Mod is also on [**Curseforge**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/primordial-weaponry)

### Go down to the 'Content' section to see what has been added thus far. 
### Or go down to the section right below to see what is planned for the future.
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
![Future Plans](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8e4e261161192845294f643d2ec5a402fd7f0279.png)
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------


Special structure's are to be added to replace the method the weapons are acquired right now. That will come before a 2.x.x. version releases. 


### Weapons to be added before or after version 2.x.x:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- Mjolnir (Marvel)

- Jingubang (Black Myth: Wukong)

- Guardian Shield (God of War)

- Bloodskal Blade (Skyrim)
  
- Iris (Witcher)
  
- Sauron's Mace (Lord of the Rings)
  
- Chillrend (Skyrim)
  
- Fierce Deity Sword (Legend of Zelda)
  
- Biggoron's Sword (Legend of Zelda)
  
- Auriel's Bow (Skyrim)
  
- Devil's Pitchfork (Mythology)
  
- Barbarian Hammer (God of War)
  
- Ascalon (Ben 10)
  
- Dragon Slayer (Berserk)
  
- Buster Sword (Final Fantasy)
</details>

_The order in which new weapons are added is entirely random_

If you want a weapon to be added to this list, let me know!


Planned to release on Fabric & Forge
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
![Content](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e8e5d4a8f230fcde9c9be9b114800cd10ce065fa.png)
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
There's new type of ore you craft new tools and weapons with. You can also repair your special weapons with this new metal. The new tier of weapons are on the same tier as Netherite, but stronger. It's very rare though, it spawns at around Y level -56 and usually comes in a vein max of 3. But you call also craft the raw variant of the new ore.

New items can be found in these new ruin structures:
![Ruin 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/39a977d81f2e37cfe1f2d6a021ba3bb67bbb75ed.png)
![Ruin 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a5f24a2c002a0c04a77d0b1e2a7d95964bf046b9.png)


**Weapons present in the latest version:**
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
  
- Master Sword

- Leviathan Axe

- Aerondight

- Blade of Chaos

- Blade of Olympus

- Excalibur

- Draupnir Spear

- Hylian Shield
  
- Thanos' Double Edged Sword
  
- Demon Blood Sword
  
- Scarlet
  
- Mjolnir (God of War)
  
- Stormbreaker
  
- Dawnbreaker

</details>






### 
### _Have fun with the mod!_
